parameters.description: The body to add to the email
parameters.name: body
parameters.example: This is an email alert from Shuffler.io :)
parameters.value:
SOC ALERT: Mimikatz Detected!

A suspicious file has been detected and analyzed automatically.

ALERT DETAILS
--------------
Hostname: $exec.text.win.system.computer
Alert Title: $exec.title
Severity: $exec.severity
SHA 256: $sha256_extractorgroup_00.group_0.#
Please investigate immediately.
This alert was automatically generated by Shuffle SOAR

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.example: The API key to use. Space = skip

parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
{
  "title": "Mimikatz Detected",
  "description": "Alert: $exec.title - Severity: $exec.severity",
  "severity": 2,
  "source": "Wazuh",
  "sourceRef": "$exec.id",
  "type": "external",
  "tags": ["mimikatz", "T1003"],
"summary": "Mimikatz credential dumping tool detected.
SHA256: $sha256_extractorgroup_00.group_0.#
Immediate investigation required."
}
